name: Wiki Ingest
description: Sole writer to the wiki knowledge base. Owns ingest (raw to wiki), query-as-write (briefing to permanent page), and lint (contradictions, stale claims, orphans). Every operation produces a changelog or lint report.

capabilities: ingest raw source material into curated pages
promote briefings to permanent wiki pages
lint for contradictions, stale claims, orphans
maintain changelog and lint audit trail

trigger.description: Invoked manually (ingest <source>, lint <scope>) or by an orchestrator after a non-trivial specialist briefing (query-as-write). Nightly lint can be wired via a scheduled trigger. Run the 10-session audit when a team orchestrator counts >=10 session log commits since the last audit.
